title: File:Norwegian Encore (50500648487).jpg
description: Norwegian Encore anchored in Weymouth Bay, England, October 17, 2020 — bow-three-quarter view showing the hull livery and 'NORWEGIAN ENCORE' nameplate, hazy afternoon light, calm open water in the foreground. Originally published on Flickr ID 50500648487.
via: curl from upload.wikimedia.org (SHA1 computed locally; Wikimedia did not publish it)

visual_verification.note: Bow-three-quarter view of Norwegian Encore at anchor; hull livery + name visible; hazy daylight; smooth water. Identity unambiguous. Good variety shot for the ship-page carousel (UK setting; Pacific Coast pack uses other images for editorial fit).
